title: The Weeping Tree
description: Something beneath the drowned parish is crying, and the graves are emptying to answer it.

scenes.description: The lychgate of the drowned parish leans out of black water. Grave-salt crusts the posts, and somewhere past the chapel a slow weeping carries over the marsh.

choices.label: Search the graves
choices.resultText: You wade between the leaning stones. Half the graves are open — dug out from below.

choices.label: Follow the weeping
choices.resultText: You push straight for the sound, past the chapel, into the older dark.

scenes.description: A crypt beneath the chapel, its floor tiled in salt-lines someone renewed for centuries — until recently. A funeral relic still hums on the altar.

choices.label: Take the relic
choices.resultText: The relic settles into your pack, warm as a held hand. The weeping outside falters, as if noticing.

choices.label: Renew the salt-lines
choices.resultText: You pour the grave-salt along the broken lines. For one clean hour, nothing in the parish moves, and the party breathes.

scenes.description: At the parish heart stands the weeping tree, roots knuckled through coffin-wood, its sap running down like tears. Every revenant in the Hollows is turned toward it, waiting.

choices.label: Put the tree to rest
choices.resultText: You lay hands on the wet bark and speak the parish's names back to it. The weeping slows, then stops. The revenants lie down in their open graves.

choices.label: Burn it
choices.resultText: The tree screams as it catches — and every grave in the Hollows answers.
